title: Hoist vector child-base multiply-add ahead of hash tail
methodology: Moved the vector `2*idx+1` child-base multiply-add earlier into the post-load XOR bundle so it overlaps with hashing, and removed the dedicated post-hash bundle that used to compute it.
motivation: Research brief flagged function optimization as unexplored, and this tests a new instruction-scheduling variant rather than the prior cache/prefetch experiments such as exp-018 and exp-022.
